impact: This advances task checkbox-103 by adding a narrow, redacted permit-process fixture with stages, facts, documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, inspection/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates without live crawl or DevHub automation.
summary: Add a fixture-only Urban Forestry permit process skeleton and deterministic validation test using public PP&D/source-inventory style evidence only.
target_task: Task checkbox-103: Add a fixture-only permit-process skeleton for an Urban Forestry permit workflow using existing public fixture/source-inventory evidence only, with stages, required facts, required documents, file rules, fee/payment gates, inspection/finalization gates, and citation-backed action gates.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
